message:
🌱 Add langflow: Support for LMStudio mission (#867)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,75 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "langflow-3973-support-for-lmstudio",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "langflow: Support for LMStudio",
+    "description": "Support for LMStudio. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current langflow setup",
+        "description": "Verify your langflow version and configuration:\n```bash\npip show langflow | grep Version\n```\nThis feature requires a working langflow installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review the feature request",
+        "description": "LM Studio (https://lmstudio.ai/) is a local LLM inference tool. This feature adds a native LMStudio model component to Langflow, enabling users to connect to a locally running LM Studio server."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the LMStudio component",
+        "description": "The fix adds a new `LMStudioModel` component that extends the base LCModelComponent with LM Studio-specific inputs:\n```python\ninputs = LCModelComponent._base_inputs + [\n    IntInput(\n        name=\"max_tokens\",\n        display_name=\"Max Tokens\",\n        advanced=True,\n        info=\"The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.\",\n        range_spec=RangeSpec(min=0, max=128000),\n    ),\n    ...\n]\n```\nA CI linting issue (RUF005) was resolved by using iterable unpacking instead of list concatenation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected.\nConfirm the LMStudio model component appears in the Langflow UI and can connect to a running LM Studio server."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Added a native LMStudio model component to Langflow that extends LCModelComponent, enabling users to connect to locally running LM Studio servers for inference.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "inputs = LCModelComponent._base_inputs + [\n    IntInput(\n        name=\"max_tokens\",\n        display_name=\"Max Tokens\",\n        advanced=True,\n        info=\"The maximum number of tokens to generate. Set to 0 for unlimited tokens.\",\n        range_spec=RangeSpec(min=0, max=128000),\n    ),\n    ...\n]"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "langflow",
+      "community",
+      "ai-app",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "langflow"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [],
+    "difficulty": "intermediate",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/issues/3973",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/langflow-ai/langflow/pull/4021"
+    },
+    "reactions": 2,
+    "comments": 11,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "tools": [
+      "pip",
+      "python"
+    ],
+    "description": "Python 3.10+ with langflow installed (pip install langflow). Optionally Docker for containerized deployment."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-12T06:48:38.201Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
